menu_featured_caption: Discover our educational programs for children aged 3–17.
blog_hero_intro: Articles, news and reflections on integrated education, developing children's potential and best practices in learning.
about_letter_seo_heading: Purpose-led learning: the whole child, families alongside, futures in motion
about_hero_tagline: Kogaion Gifted Academy is an innovative centre in education, with 10 years of experience designing and developing integrated educational programmes, differentiated to the learning needs of each age group and individualized education.
about_hero_subline: Kogaion Gifted Academy is the first integrated enrichment education centre in Romania to promote the concept of integrated knowledge in education.
about_hero_paradigm: Kogaion Gifted Academy is the promoter of the paradigm shift in education that led to the launch of unique adjacent projects in Romania, benefiting children across the country.
about_vision_body: We believe in discovering the creative human being, capable of high academic performance, in every child. We believe and support the uniqueness of each child and each family through integrated education.
about_campaign_body: Kogaion Gifted Academy is a model of best practices in education, having initiated in 2016 the first national awareness campaign on the importance of discovering children's abilities — "From discovering and harnessing children's native potential to stress-free performance". The campaign took place in the 2016–2017 school year in 8 cities across Romania, with over 1,400 parents and educators participating.
about_programs_structure_intro: Our programmes support children's development at every age stage and are structured as follows:
about_program_enrichment_detail: Afterschool, courses, urban camps — children 5+ — Bucharest
about_program_family_detail: Ages 3–6, 7–12 and parents — Moieciu de Sus
about_mentors_lead: Our mentors are specialized in diverse fields of knowledge, multi- and trans-disciplinary, dedicated, empathetic, and passionate about what they do.
about_mission_bullet1: to discover, recover, develop and harness the creative potential of your child and your family
about_mission_bullet2: to promote a paradigm shift in education, grounded in the concept of integrated, differentiated and individualized education that respects the uniqueness of each human being
about_mission_bullet3: to be a model of best practices in education
about_integrated_intro: The integrated vision of an approach aimed at discovering, recovering, developing and harnessing the uniqueness of the child is ensured by:
about_integrated_item1: an integrated enrichment curriculum structured around 3 dimensions: opening the horizon of multi- and trans-disciplinary knowledge, deepening and excelling in one or more passion domains
about_integrated_item2: collaborative learning contexts that enhance each child's uniqueness and well-being
about_integrated_item3: multidisciplinary, empathetic mentors, passionate about what they do
about_integrated_item4: methods that lead to creativity development and maximization of children's aptitudes
about_integrated_item5: building character and developing human qualities
about_integrated_skills_intro: We promote education based on the integrated development of essential skills for the 21st century:
about_skill_9: Multiple intelligences and both cerebral hemispheres
about_transdisciplinary_body: To meet the challenges of a constantly changing world, learning must promote both traditional approaches, deepening each discipline, and especially inter- and trans-disciplinary approaches, child-centered, participatory and representative at local, national or global level, structured around socially relevant themes. The novelty of the trans-disciplinary approach lies in the fact that, instead of studying certain disciplines without connecting knowledge, we start from a central theme that is analyzed trans-disciplinarily, passing through several disciplines, thus making correlations between information and opening up to new meanings, to the complexity of life. Thus, the child explains notions and semantics from multiple perspectives and develops the ability to identify real solutions to given problems, to adapt in complex social contexts and thus comes to respect every element in nature, every being, every person and adopt a positive behavior towards the universe we live in.
about_founders_intro: Founded by Diana Antoci and Florian Colceag in the summer of 2013, Kogaion Gifted Academy was established as the first Academy of Integrated and Complex Knowledge and Intelligence in Romania.
about_founders_diana_bio: Founder Kogaion Gifted Academy, Trainer in psychopedagogy of excellence founded by prof. dr. Florian Colceag, Feuerstein Trainer
about_founders_florian_bio: International Expert in Gifted Education, promoter of gifted education in Romania, doctorate in economics, mathematician, Founder Kogaion Gifted Academy, Founder of the Institute for Research and Development of Human Knowledge
about_potential_paragraph1: Discovering, developing and harnessing this POTENTIAL is defining for developing passions, opening horizons of knowledge, finding purpose and happiness in life.
about_potential_paragraph2: These "gifts" take shape through a series of predominant ABILITIES and APTITUDES that strongly influence the individual particularities of the child: how they know the world, how they interpret and understand it, how they manage to interact with it. Identified, encouraged and nurtured, these determine the child to know and experience with pleasure, to make effort, cultivate and develop SELF-ESTEEM and the CONFIDENCE that they are VALUABLE. They help them remain curious and open to life's challenges.
about_potential_paragraph3: The role of parents and educators is defining in becoming aware of the risk of wasting or burying the native potential of children, as well as in becoming aware of adjacent dangers, translated into demotivation, behavioral deviations and failure.
home_intro_body: Kogaion Gifted Academy designs and develops integrated educational programmes, differentiated to the learning needs of each age group — from early years to secondary.
home_age_intro: Our programmes support children's development at every stage:
contact_hero_intro: Get in touch with the Kogaion team. We are here to answer your questions about our programmes and admissions.
contact_form_help: We respond quickly with details about programmes and admissions.
contact_success_message: Thank you. Your message has been sent. We will get back to you shortly.
mentors_intro: The professionals who bring value to your child's uniqueness.
mentors_cta_body: Our mentors are involved across enrichment, camps and advanced learning formats tailored to each child.
programs_title: Programmes for children and families — your pace, real purpose
programs_intro: From after-school and enrichment in Bucharest to mountain camps and family experiences: each format is designed by age stage, with an integrated curriculum and gifted-education inspiration — for every child, not just labels.
programs_from_about_intro: Our programmes support children's development at every age stage — from opening horizons of knowledge and identifying native abilities to achieving performance in their field of passion and understanding life's complexity. They are built on gifted education principles and address every child from the premise of uniqueness.
programs_seo_title: Kogaion Gifted Academy | Programmes — Bucharest after-school, children's & family camps (ages 3–18)
programs_seo_description: Explore Kogaion programmes: enrichment and after-school in Bucharest, camps for children, teens and families. Filter by age, read the details and choose the right path.
programs_list_heading: Programmes for every stage of growth
programs_list_lead: You're not looking for “one more activity” — you want context, people and clarity. Explore our formats and use the age filters to see what fits your child.
programs_empty_body: Try another age group or view all programmes — we're here to help you choose.
programs_help_title: Not sure which programme fits you?
programs_help_body: Tell us your child's age and what you're looking for — we'll point you to concrete options, no pressure.
